reviews.comment:
La última YPF que vas a ver en muchos km asi que llenale a ese tanque, porque en las estaciones de pueblos como Seclantas o San Antonio de los Cobres te pueden llegar a cargar cualquier cosa (agua).

(Translated by Google)
The last YPF station you'll see for many miles, so fill up that tank, because at the stations in towns like Seclantas or San Antonio de los Cobres, they can fill up anything (water).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURaalliM0FnEAE

reviews.comment:
Hermoso brealito sus paisajes y su gente 👌

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful Brealito, its landscapes and its people 👌
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURaaGJ1cWZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Muy amable el playero. Envidio su humor. Estaba solo atendiendo todo el lugar con una fila de más de 10 autos y otras tantas motos. Admito que es domingo pero alguien tiene que tirarle una mano

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendant is very friendly. I envy his sense of humor. He was alone, manning the entire place with a line of more than 10 cars and just as many motorcycles. I admit it's Sunday, but someone has to lend a hand.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURadnZTNzhnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Mucha demora, un solo playero, no venden agua caliente. Muy flojo para un lugar turístico importante como es Cachi

(Translated by Google)
Long wait times, only one attendant, and they don't sell hot water. Very poor service for an important tourist destination like Cachi.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURaNHRDRVh3EAE

reviews.comment:
Unica YPF del pueblo, tengan paciencia ya que se arma fila para cargar. Personal amable y nos brindaron agua caliente para mate a pesar de no tener el servicio.

(Translated by Google)
The only YPF gas station in town, so be patient as there's often a line to fill up. The staff was friendly and even gave us hot water for mate despite not having that service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURad0p2VlpnEAE
